name: Praia da Marinha
description: One of the most iconic beaches in Portugal, known for its golden cliffs and crystal-clear waters.

name: Praia da Falésia
description: A long stretch of sandy beach backed by striking red cliffs, perfect for walking and relaxing.

name: Praia de Benagil
description: Famous for its sea cave, accessible by kayak or boat, offering a unique coastal experience.

name: Playa de Ses Illetes
description: A Caribbean-like beach in Spain with shallow turquoise waters and soft white sand.

name: La Concha Beach
description: A beautiful city beach with calm waters and a scenic promenade.

name: Navagio Beach
description: Also known as Shipwreck Beach, famous for its dramatic cliffs and rusted shipwreck.

name: Myrtos Beach
description: A stunning beach surrounded by high cliffs and deep blue waters.

name: Elafonissi Beach
description: Known for its unique pink-tinted sand and shallow lagoons.

name: Cala Goloritzé
description: A UNESCO-protected beach with clear water and dramatic limestone formations.

name: Rabbit Beach
description: A pristine beach often ranked among the best in the world.

name: Zlatni Rat
description: A unique horn-shaped beach that changes shape with the wind and currents.

name: Banje Beach
description: A popular beach with views of Dubrovnik’s historic old town.

name: Durdle Door Beach
description: Famous for its natural limestone arch and scenic coastal views.

name: Reynisfjara Beach
description: A dramatic black sand beach with basalt columns and powerful waves.

name: Palombaggia Beach
description: A tropical-looking beach with clear waters and pine trees.

name: Fig Tree Bay
description: A family-friendly beach with calm waters and golden sand.

name: Nissi Beach
description: A lively beach known for its shallow waters and vibrant atmosphere.

name: Balos Lagoon
description: A breathtaking lagoon with turquoise water and white sand.

name: Cala Macarella
description: A secluded cove surrounded by cliffs and pine trees.

name: Porto Katsiki
description: A dramatic beach accessed by stairs, famous for its vivid blue waters.
